# zstack_volume_backup (Resource)

This resource allows you to manage volume backups in ZStack. A volume backup is a point-in-time copy of a volume stored in ImageStore backup storage.

`backup_storage_uuid` must point to an `ImageStoreBackupStorage`. `SftpBackupStorage` is not supported for `zstack_volume_backup`.


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_storage_uuid` (String) The UUID of an ImageStoreBackupStorage. SftpBackupStorage is not supported for volume backups.
- `name` (String) The name of the volume backup.
- `volume_uuid` (String) The UUID of the volume to backup.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the volume backup.

### Read-Only

- `size` (Number) The size of the volume backup in bytes.
- `state` (String) The state of the volume backup.
- `status` (String) The status of the volume backup.
- `type` (String) The type of the volume backup.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the volume backup.
